_comment: Overrides for build-books.js. 'merge' maps a variant normalized key to a canonical normalized key; 'titles' overrides the display title for a canonical key; 'ignore' drops noisy keys. Keys are lowercased, alphanumeric, space-collapsed (see normKey). Only genuine subtitle/edition variants of the SAME work are merged here; same-prefix but different books (e.g. 'deep learning' vs 'deep learning on graphs') are intentionally kept separate.

merge.semantic web for the working ontologist: semantic web for the working ontologist
semantic web for the working ontologist
merge.ai engineering: ai engineering building applications with foundation models
merge.dama dmbok data management body of knowl: dama dmbok data management body of knowledge
dama dmbok data management body of knowledge
merge.hands on machine learning with scikit le: hands on machine learning with scikit learn keras and tensorflow
